exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your family therapy forward
items: Research and contact 3-5 family therapists in your area to schedule initial consultations
Create a family history document listing each member\
Establish clear family therapy goals by writing down 3-5 specific outcomes you hope to achieve together
Schedule and attend individual pre-therapy consultations with each family member who will participate
Research your insurance coverage and create a budget plan for ongoing family therapy sessions
Gather and organize important family documents and history to share with your therapist
